subcodes.first_line: O concourse of humanity! The Call hath been raised from the Most Great Scene, and before that from the Land of Ṭá and from [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا معشر البشر قد ارتفع الندآء من المنظر الاکبر و من قبله فی ارض الطاء و من
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @exhortations and counsels, @proclamation to the people of the world, @chastity and purity, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
